docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $11,399.88 FILED BY ROSENBLUM, MATTHEW KOENIG AS TO DEFENDANT 2400 PACIFIC AVENUE, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-2026 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO APR-06-2026 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 (SMALL CLAIMS COURT FOR 6:30 PM IS NOT OPEN AT THIS TIME) TRIAL OF APR-06-2026 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-27-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $186.20 AS TO DEFENDANT 2400 PACIFIC AVENUE, LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) HASMIK NAZARI, PROPERTY MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT 2400 PACIFIC AVENUE, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-06-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-06-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF MATTHEW KOENING ROSENBLUM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 2400 PACIFIC AVENUE, LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY HASMIK NAZARI, PROPERTY MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSENBLUM, MATTHEW KOENIG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 2400 PACIFIC AVENUE, LLC $3,757.00 PRINCIPAL, $261.20 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,018.20, DEFENDANT'S ARGUMENT THAT PLAINTIFF BREACHED LEASE BY NOT OBTAINING RENTER'S INSURANCE FOUR YEARS AGO IS WAIVED & ESTOPPED. FURTHER THE CONTRACT LANGUAGE DOES NOT PURPORT TO INDEMNIFY THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
